hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if ! echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git push'; then exit 0; fi; sleep 8; RUN_ID=$(gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$RUN_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; gh run watch "$RUN_ID" --exit-status >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; DETAILS=$(gh run view "$RUN_ID" --log-failed 2>&1 | head -100); jq -n --arg id "$RUN_ID" --arg d "$DETAILS" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"GitHub Actions run \($id) FAILED. Investigate the logs and propose fixes:\n\($d)"}}'; exit 2
